consumer_electronics.title: Meta turns off the Instagram feature that let users make AI deepfakes of public accounts
consumer_electronics.summary: Following significant backlash, Meta is turning off the feature it announced this week that let users generate AI images based on content from public Instagram accounts just by tagging them. consumer_electronics.title: The FCC is cracking down on DJI tech that dodged the foreign drone ban

consumer_electronics.title: Apple sues OpenAI for allegedly stealing hardware secrets
consumer_electronics.summary: Apple has sued OpenAI, alleging that engineers stole Apple secrets to advance the AI startup's hardware plans. In its complaint, Apple says it uncovered "a pattern of theft of Apple's trade secrets by OpenAI employees who were formerly at Apple." channel_news.title: Marketplace Briefing: AI traffic is poised to reshape the Amazon funnel
channel_news.summary: Every Amazon agency right now is trying to get a sense of what role AI referral traffic is playing — and will play — in driving purchases, even if they don't have much data to go off of yet.

channel_news.title: Sam’s Club taps Weight Watchers to expand its membership benefits
channel_news.summary: Sam’s Club has partnered with Weight Watchers on new membership benefits, including a program that provides medical support to GLP-1 users.

channel_news.title: Levi’s has filed 2 new lawsuits this year to protect its red tab trademark
channel_news.summary: Levi's has sought to protect its red tab trademark this year by filing lawsuits against Farm Rio and the Australian brand S/Double. The lawsuits accuse the brands of using similar design elements that risk customer confusion and cause harm to the Levi's brand.

channel_news.title: Meta’s AI glasses are already among the fastest sellers at America’s Best, Eyeglass World
channel_news.summary: AI-powered glasses are beginning to make an impact on one of the largest vision retailers in the country.

channel_news.title: How Dollar Shave Club decides when to use AI-generated creative
channel_news.summary: Dollar Shave Club has started to embrace using generative AI for ad creative, most recently for its Fourth of July campaign.

channel_news.title: Why a brand’s reputation precedes it in the AI-driven search era
channel_news.summary: In the AI-driven search era, a brand’s reputation precedes it. Earned media is the mechanism through which brands can build the trust and credibility that makes them worth recommending. It’s the difference between being present and being chosen. Sponsored by Journey Further

channel_news.title: Kohl’s zeroes in on Nike for back-to-school marketing
channel_news.summary: Kohl's is "leaning heavily" into Nike as part of its new back-to-school campaign, executives shared. The investment includes a broader assortment, as well as Nike-themed tunnel-walk installations in stores.

channel_news.title: How category creators like Willow and Oura ward off dupes and defend their leads
channel_news.summary: In an age where dupes are more prevalent than ever before, companies are on the hunt for new ways to defend their first-mover advantage. Leaders at Willow, Oura and SharkNinja say the key to defending your position as a category creator is solving customer problems, not just launching first.
